name: Infinity Valley
description: An AI emotional companion App with gamified features. Provides companionship through text, voice, and video chat, along with personified tool features like memos, alarms, and listening to music together. Led the full AI system rebuild including sync/async Agent architecture and Agentic memory system.
descriptionZh: AI 情感陪伴类、带有游戏化属性的 App 产品。通过文字、语音、视频聊天提供情感陪伴，并以AI Native交互方式提供备忘录、闹钟、一起听音乐等工具功能。
highlightsZh: AI 系统整体架构重构
同步和异步 Agent 系统设计与构建

name: OneStory
description: An AI-native platform for visual storytelling, serving directors, storyboard artists, and content creators. Building the complete AI pipeline from creative ideas to scripts, storyboards, and videos.
descriptionZh: 面向垂类创作者的 AI 原生视觉叙事平台，服务导演、分镜师和内容创作者。构建从创意到脚本、分镜、视频的完整 AI 创作流程。
highlights: Reduced production costs by 30% for Liu Yexi IP
highlightsZh: 一年内注册用户超 25 万
为柳夜熙 IP 降低 30% 制作成本

name: AIGC Viral Videos
description: Multiple viral AIGC videos with millions of views, showcasing AI-powered storytelling and character animation.
descriptionZh: 产出多部百万级及千万级播放量的 AIGC 爆款视频，展示 AI 驱动的叙事能力和角色动画技术。
highlightsZh: 李幼斌跨时空对话李云龙 – 1200万+播放

name: Voka – Full-Body Motion Capture
nameZh: Voka 全身动捕直播软件
description: Real-time virtual streaming software using ordinary cameras for face, hand, and full-body motion capture. Deployed on PC and mobile platforms.
descriptionZh: 使用普通摄像头进行面部、手部和全身动作捕捉的实时虚拟直播软件，已部署在 PC 和移动端平台。
